title: Welcome to SwiftClass.
body:
Light as a feather, swift as a bird. Welcome to SwiftClass. This slideshow will show you how to use the app.
Click Next to move on.

title: The Radial Menu
body:
The Radial Menu is the fastest way to navigate through the app.
It can be opened by pressing Space or Right Mouse at any time. 
It will appear at the mouse's position, and you can click on any of the buttons to navigate to a different page. It should look like the one below.

title: The Home Page
body:
The home page is the starting point of SwiftClass.
It's where you can view the latest news. Most of your time will not be spent here, but you can still use the buttons below to navigate to other pages. It should look like the image below.

title: The Settings Page
body:
The Settings menu is where you can change how the app works. 
This includes themes (eventually), visual tweaks, possible performance changes, and notification control.

title: The Class Page
body:
The Classes Page is where you can view basic info about your classes.
You can see your teacher's names, a link associated with the class, and its assigned block. (if used)

title: The Links Page
body:
The Links Page is where you can find all the important links related to your work. 
They are fully customizable, so you can add any link you want. You can also organize them into types for better organization.

title: The Agendas Page
body:
The Agendas Page is where you can view all your upcoming events. 
They will be set up by you, and organized based on class and date. After they're set, they'll be saved to your device.

title: Very Important Note
body:
In the bottom-left corner of every menu, there will be an "i" button. Clicking on it will open a menu with information about the page you're on. 
This slideshow can be replayed by clicking that button on the home page.
We suggest you start with the Classes page to set up.
